l2category: Bajaj Finserv DBS Co-branded Credit Card
question: What should I do if my Bajaj Finserv DBS Bank Credit Card application is under process and I need an update?
answer: We regret to inform you that we are no longer accepting new applications for our co-brand credit cards. If you have any questions about a credit card application that is currently being processed or if you need assistance with an existing credit card, please feel free to contact DBS Bank at SuperCardCare@dbs.com or call 1860 267 6789. They'll be happy to assist you with your concerns.
